rationale.R1.3: The draft conflates calibration and selective prediction, which are distinct properties.
rationale.R1.7: The citation error regarding Hendrycks & Gimpel (2017) is significant.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is excellent; the authors clearly mark confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is poor; the draft does not cover selective prediction as claimed.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is weak; the deployment recommendation is overconfident.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are lacking; methodological details are unclear.
